currentFocus: Music live-bundle readiness hardening is integrated on local main; docs/state now point the next executable UI slice at PatchBenchLaunchPresetText presentation-only extraction.

currentDocsTruth.integratedWave: Canonical docs/state summarize the accepted music live-bundle readiness hardening, the adversarial status-lock correction, prior PatchBench presentation extraction, storage-retention no-delete results, and stale Git administrative metadata pruning without treating local campaign reports, local worktree paths, raw manifests, or unmerged worker commits as durable public truth.
currentDocsTruth.stateReconciliation: goal.md, developer_agent_state.json, documentation_agent_state.json, and re_orchestrator_state.json record the music live-bundle fail-closed/pre-arm state, partial-bounded storage inventory, Ghidra/proof no-delete closeout, scoped consult-compliance finding, next PatchBenchLaunchPresetText seam, and explicit non-claims.
currentDocsTruth.musicLiveBundleReadiness: The public gate is fail-closed/pre-arm only: producerCoverageComplete=true can coexist with readyToRunLiveAttempt=false, liveArmAllowed=false, runtimeAudibleOutputProof=false, and preArmReadiness.status=prearm-readiness-not-proven. The armed executor requires a private accepted pre-arm readiness JSON before live delegation, and top-level gate status is value-locked after adversarial correction.
currentDocsTruth.patchBenchPresentation: PatchBenchSafeCopyOutcomeText now owns safe-copy music replacement status-line copy for default, not-ready, progress, staged, restore, and failure states. BinaryPatchesPage routes the status text through the helper while keeping service calls, operation logs, AppStatusService updates, and UI assignment in the page.
currentDocsTruth.storageCloseoutSummary: Public-safe state records only category outcomes: Ghidra backup deletion 0 files, proof archive deletion 0 files, accepted cleanup 0 GiB, and stale Git administrative worktree metadata 23 records pruned after dry-run. Retained review-pool sizes are informational and not deletion eligibility.
currentDocsTruth.storagePolicyDocs: No tracked storage policy edit was needed. LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md and coordination docs already cover local-only campaign manifests, scratch non-durability, and manifest/classification requirements before Ghidra/proof pruning.
currentDocsTruth.runtimeProofRecommendation: Music live-bundle tooling remains fail-closed. Future private live execution waits on explicit authority, leases, empty isolated proof root, no preexisting BEA/CDB processes, and capture span/flush/decode-window readiness proven by the private pre-arm artifact and executor path.
currentDocsTruth.consultCompliance: Scoped only: recent inspected June 29 non-trivial worker outputs had no clear skipped Cursor lane, but report-shape and sanitized-context evidence gaps prevent any blanket campaign-wide compliance claim.
currentDocsTruth.patchBenchNextSeam: Next compact PatchBench presentation seam is PatchBenchLaunchPresetText for launch/control preset automation names and status-message text only. Receipt/source-summary helpers remain deferred until primitive projection design is accepted.
currentDocsTruth.rebuildFrontDoor: ROADMAP-INDEX links the compact rebuild-front-door chain map. The map is routing/discoverability only and does not claim runtime, visual, gameplay, rebuild, or no-noticeable-difference parity.
currentDocsTruth.localOnlyBoundary: Hard payloads, screenshots/frame dumps, raw proof logs, copied executables, full Ghidra databases, secrets, .env* files, build output, package output, local runtime caches, local proof paths, raw proof evidence, and raw local manifests stay out of tracked docs/state unless a public-safe summary is explicitly warranted.
currentDocsTruth.releasePublicationStatus: No release, tag, package, signing, installer, announcement, hosted workflow, or publication action is part of this integration.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: Music readiness gate/executor hardening, readiness note, prior presentation-helper extraction, storage no-delete summary, stale Git metadata pruning summary, and state reconciliation only; no AppCore, patch catalog row, byte patch, launch argument behavior, safe-copy manifest/signature, runtime proof, release/publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim change.
